metadata.name: Instituto Soares
metadata.title: Instituto Soares — Chiropractic & Advanced Aesthetics | Agualva-Cacém
metadata.description: Expert chiropractic care and advanced aesthetic treatments in Agualva-Cacém. Spinal adjustments, therapeutic massage, facial cleansing, laser hair removal, and more. 5-star rated.

hero.tagline: Expert chiropractic adjustments and advanced aesthetic treatments — your wellness, our craft.

about.body:
Instituto Soares is a dual-specialty clinic in Agualva-Cacém run by the Soares family. We combine expert chiropractic care with advanced aesthetic treatments — because true wellness is about how you feel and how you look.

Every procedure is explained step by step. Every client receives personalized follow-up care. From your first consultation to your follow-up visit, we treat you like family.

conditions.subtitle: We specialize in treating a wide range of musculoskeletal and skin conditions.

items.title: Back Pain
items.description: Lower and upper back pain relief through targeted spinal adjustments and therapeutic massage.

items.title: Neck & Shoulder Pain
items.description: Cervical adjustments for stiffness, tension, and chronic neck and shoulder pain.

items.title: Lumbar Pain
items.description: Decompression techniques to relieve lumbar pressure and sciatica symptoms.

items.title: Posture Correction
items.description: Long-term postural improvement for desk workers, students, and active individuals.

items.title: Acne & Skin Issues
items.description: Professional deep cleansing and skincare consultations for acne, oily skin, and blemishes.

items.title: Aesthetic Enhancement
items.description: Microblading, laser hair removal, eyelash extensions, and advanced skin treatments.

items.title: Spinal Adjustment
items.description: Precise manual adjustments to restore proper spinal alignment and relieve pain.

items.title: Therapeutic Massage IS
items.description: Our signature massage combining deep tissue techniques for full-body tension relief.

items.title: Pain Relief Session
items.description: Targeted treatment for back, neck, shoulder, and lumbar pain with immediate results.

items.title: Deep Facial Cleansing
items.description: Professional skin cleansing with personalized aftercare routine and product recommendations.

items.title: Laser Hair Removal
items.description: Diode laser technology for all skin types, comfortable and effective permanent reduction.

items.title: Microblading & Lashes
items.description: Natural-looking eyebrow microblading and eyelash extensions by a certified specialist.

process.subtitle: Your path to better health and confidence, step by step.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.description: We listen to your concerns, review your history, and understand your goals.

steps.title: Assessment
steps.description: Comprehensive evaluation to identify the root cause and design the best approach.

steps.title: Treatment Plan
steps.description: A personalized care plan tailored to your condition, preferences, and lifestyle.

steps.title: Treatment
steps.description: Expert hands-on care — every step explained, your comfort always our priority.

steps.title: Follow-Up
steps.description: Ongoing care instructions, progress tracking, and support between visits.

team.subtitle: The Soares family — dedicated to your wellness and beauty.

members.name: Netto Soares
members.description: Netto brings precision and care to every adjustment. Known for explaining every step clearly, he transforms fear into confidence and pain into relief. Patients consistently describe feeling lighter and renewed after a single session.

members.name: Roberta Soares
members.description: With over 5 years of dedicated practice, Roberta combines expert technique with genuine warmth. From facial cleansing to laser hair removal, she delivers visible results with personalized aftercare that keeps clients coming back year after year.

reviews.subtitle: Real feedback from real patients — 5.0 rating on Google.

items.quote: If I could give 10 stars, I would. I've been doing treatment with Netto who has helped me immensely — I notice improvement with every session. Roberta is also excellent with her skincare treatments. Both are extremely professional and caring.
items.name: Silvia Mendes

items.quote: I had back pain so intense I couldn't sleep. After being treated by Dr. Netto, the pain decreased, and after continuing treatment I'm now pain-free. I also recommend Roberta's aesthetics treatments — magic hands and true dedication.
items.name: Emely Luísa

items.quote: The facial cleansing was amazing from start to finish — relaxing and professional. My skin is visibly cleaner, softer, and much healthier. Dr. Roberta's personalized skincare consultation at the end was incredibly detailed.
items.name: Boris

items.quote: I did chiropractic followed by therapeutic massage and only have praise! The professional was attentive, explained every step clearly, and gave me great confidence. I left feeling light and aligned. A true relief for body and mind!
items.name: Bruno Andrade

items.quote: The clinic is exceptionally well-maintained. Netto is an excellent professional — he attended me, we talked, asked for my consent before the procedure. The pain in my back and spine was gone so quickly after the adjustment. Super recommend!
items.name: Nice Salimatu Camará

items.quote: I went for a chiropractic session and a signature massage with Dr. Netto. It felt like a weight was lifted from my shoulders! A very rewarding session — he explained all the stages and addressed every point that needed attention.
items.name: David Silva

hours.subtitle: We're here when you need us.
hours.note: Appointments recommended. Call or message us to book your visit.

pricing.subtitle: Transparent pricing for every stage of your treatment.
pricing.disclaimer: Prices may vary based on individual treatment needs. Contact us for a personalized quote.

plans.name: Aesthetics Session
features: Deep facial cleansing OR laser session

items.question: Is chiropractic care safe?
items.answer: Absolutely. Netto explains every step before and during treatment. Patients consistently report feeling safe, secure, and confident throughout the process. Many who were initially nervous about chiropractic leave as loyal clients.

items.question: Does the adjustment hurt?
items.answer: No. Our patients describe the experience as relieving, not painful. You may hear a gentle sound during the adjustment, but the technique is precise and comfortable. Most patients feel immediate relief.

items.question: What should I expect on my first visit?
items.answer: A full consultation where we listen to your concerns, assess your condition, and explain the proposed treatment. Your consent is always asked before any procedure. You'll leave with a clear care plan.

items.question: Can I combine chiropractic and aesthetics services?
items.answer: Yes! Many of our clients enjoy both services in a single visit. You might start with a spinal adjustment with Netto and follow up with a facial treatment with Roberta.

items.question: How many chiropractic sessions will I need?
items.answer: It depends on your condition. Some patients feel significant relief after the first session. For chronic issues, a treatment plan of several sessions is typically recommended for lasting results.

items.question: Is laser hair removal suitable for all skin types?
items.answer: Yes. We use diode laser technology that is safe and effective for all skin types, including darker tones. Roberta adjusts the temperature and settings for your comfort and safety.
